Your Future Begins Here

Luxury Rehab in Florida, Offering Multiple Pathways to Recovery from Addiction and Mental Health Conditions

Our Programs
Get Help Now

What We Treat

At Futures Recovery Healthcare luxury rehab, we address a wide range of behavioral health needs, including substance use disorder (SUD), co-occurring disorders, trauma, and primary mental health conditions. Our approach is grounded in evidence-based practices and a holistic approach that combines somatic medicine, psychotherapies, physical therapy, and wellness services.

Futures CORE Program

Detox Residential & Outpatient Care

Our dual-diagnosis residential luxury rehab program offers a comprehensive approach with extensive clinical hours and integrated care. We provide a blend of Integrated medical and Psychiatric services, Psychotherapy, Integrated Trauma Treatment, Physical Therapy, Wellness Services, Family Programming, and Alumni Support, all designed to ensure continuous care and to help you build a strong foundation in recovery.

Get Help for Addiction

Futures RESET Program

Mental Health, Residential & Outpatient Care

The Futures luxury mental health program delivers evidence-based therapies and interventions for a range of conditions, including anxiety, depression, trauma, and other mood and thought disorders. A private floor, dedicated group spaces, and a specialized team create a secure and private environment for effective healing.

Explore Mental Health

Our Facility

Recognized as a leading luxury residential treatment center, Futures Recovery Healthcare caters to adults 18 and older. Located in Tequesta, Florida, our family-owned and operated facility has been a beacon of care since 2012. Set on a lush, 9-acre campus with all services conveniently located under one roof, we offer a nurturing environment that fosters safety and community.

  • Private, Gated Facility
  • All services under one roof
  • Private Bedrooms
  • Private Bathrooms
  • Art Studio
  • Wellness Center & Spa
  • Pool & Hot Tub
  • Tennis & Pickleball Courts
  • Basketball & Volleyball Courts
  • Walking Meditations
Discover Our Facility
Call Us Now866-351-7588
701 N Old Dixie Hwy
Tequesta, Florida 33469

Specialty Programs

Our HERO’S and ORENDA luxury rehab programs provide tailored recovery solutions for those with unique demands. HERO’S offers comprehensive support for first responders, veterans, and healthcare professionals, while ORENDA is designed for professionals and high-net-worth individuals, ensuring privacy, flexibility, and excellence in care.

Futures HERO’S Program

First Responders, Veterans & Healthcare

HERO’S Ascent at Futures targets mental health conditions common among first responders, healthcare professionals and veterans, such as trauma, chronic pain, and addiction. Our personalized care plans integrate medical treatment, psychiatry, individual and group therapy, physical therapy, and wellness services.

Learn More

Futures ORENDA Program

Professionals & High Net Worth Individuals

Orenda at Futures is designed for individuals with public personas and high-demand occupations who cannot escape stressors that fuel addiction and dysfunction. We offer concierge-level service and flexible programs for the most intensive, personalized care.

Learn More

Futures Programs Amenities

Accommodations & Comfort

*The MetaVida Program is designed to integrate with any Futures program, allowing you and your care team to personalize your treatment with innovative outpatient services.

Wellness & Creative Living

*The MetaVida Program is designed to integrate with any Futures program, allowing you and your care team to personalize your treatment with innovative outpatient services.

Recreation & Leisure (On-Site)

*The MetaVida Program is designed to integrate with any Futures program, allowing you and your care team to personalize your treatment with innovative outpatient services.

Outdoor & Off-site Adventures

*Adventure-based therapies are optional services and are not included in the cost of treatment. Participation requires separate payment and may vary based on availability.

*The MetaVida Program is designed to integrate with any Futures program, allowing you and your care team to personalize your treatment with innovative outpatient services.

Over a Decade of Quality Care

Futures Recovery Healthcare boasts a DCF state license, Joint Commission accreditation, and AHCA licensure. Our secure, private gated campus in Tequesta, Florida, offers a tranquil setting just miles from the Atlantic Coast. With a team of masters-level clinicians, medical professionals, and credentialed staff, we uphold the highest standards of care in behavioral healthcare.

Our Approach

At Futures, innovative healing methods thrive within a multidisciplinary framework and integrated luxury trauma treatment. Ethical client care is at the core of our practice. We aim to empower individuals to manage chronic health conditions effectively, guiding them toward a life that is authentic, productive, and joyful.

Contact Us

Are you looking for luxury rehab in Florida for yourself, a loved one, or a client? Connect with our experienced admissions team to discuss your needs confidentially and explore how we can assist. We work with most major insurance providers, including Aetna and Blue Cross/Blue Shield, and are dedicated to helping you maximize your coverage.

Call Us Now866-351-7588
701 N Old Dixie Hwy
Tequesta, Florida 33469

Futures embraces the complexity of addiction, co-occurring mental health, and primary mental health conditions to empower recovery and improve outcomes through evidence-based practice, coordinated care, and mission-driven culture.

Call Us Now866-351-7588
701 N Old Dixie Hwy
Tequesta, Florida 33469

About Us

Empowering Recovery Through Compassionate, Comprehensive Care.

Our Team

At Futures Recovery Healthcare, every team member is dedicated to delivering the most compassionate, and dignified treatment experience.

Our priority is providing quality care and exceptional service through a collaborative approach. Led by an experienced medical and management team with hundreds of years of direct care experience, our licensed and credentialed professionals work alongside a well-trained operations team to maintain a safe, comfortable, and supportive environment. Together, we are committed to continuously improving individual patient care and enhancing the overall treatment program.

Meet the Team

Our Philosophy

Futures Recovery Healthcare is committed to delivering comprehensive, coordinated, evidence-based care that empowers individuals and families on their journey to recovery. Our philosophy centers on thorough assessments, integrated summaries, and informed, individualized treatment plans. We prioritize a holistic approach that integrates trauma-informed care across all programs, ensuring each patient receives personalized care that addresses both mental health and co-occurring conditions, promoting long-term wellness and recovery.

This commitment is reflected in our evidence-based addiction treatment services and mental health services, which form the foundation of our comprehensive recovery programs.

Our Facility

Our luxury facility is located on a secure, 9-acre gated campus in Tequesta, Florida. It offers a comprehensive range of services, including detox, residential treatment, and outpatient programs, all designed to provide a serene and supportive environment. 

Amenities include private suites, a wellness center, a fitness studio, and dedicated spaces for therapy and relaxation, ensuring that all aspects of care are conveniently accessible on-site.

  • Private, Gated Facility
  • All services under one roof
  • Private Accommodations
  • Fitness Center
  • Art Studio
  • Wellness Center & Spa
  • Pool & Hot Tub
  • Tennis & Pickleball Courts
  • Basketball & Volleyball Courts
  • Low Ropes Course
Take a Virtual Tour
Call Us Now866-351-7588
701 N Old Dixie Hwy
Tequesta, Florida 33469

Testimonials

Futures Recovery Healthcare is accredited by The Joint Commission, the leading accrediting body in the United States, symbolizing our commitment to the highest standards of care. We are also licensed by the Agency for Health Care Administration (AHCA) in Florida, meeting rigorous standards for residential treatment facilities.

Our patients and referring professionals have shared their positive experiences, highlighting the impact of our care:

Call Us Now866-351-7588

Accreditations and Affiliations

Events

Futures hosts a variety of events to support our patients and community, including the Days of Ascent program, alumni gatherings, and specialized workshops for colleagues and professionals. These events offer education, connection, and ongoing support for individuals in recovery.

Learn More

Careers

Join our dedicated team at Futures Recovery Healthcare, where your skills and compassion can make a difference in the lives of those seeking recovery. We offer opportunities for growth and development within a supportive, mission-driven organization.

Learn More

Contact Us

For more information about our programs, facility tours, or career opportunities, please reach out to our admissions and outreach teams. We are here to assist you on your journey to recovery.

Call Us Now866-351-7588
701 N Old Dixie Hwy
Tequesta, Florida 33469

Futures embraces the complexity of addiction, co-occurring mental health, and primary mental health conditions to empower recovery and improve outcomes through evidence-based practice, coordinated care, and mission-driven culture.

Call Us Now866-351-7588
701 N Old Dixie Hwy
Tequesta, Florida 33469

Our Programs

At Futures Recovery Healthcare, we offer a wide range of luxury rehab treatment programs in Florida to treat co-occurring disorders and primary mental illnesses Our holistic, evidence-based approach combines psychosomatic medicine, psychotherapy, and wellness services within a serene, 9-acre campus in Tequesta, Florida.

Program Overview
Get Help Now

Our diverse range of luxury rehab programs is designed to provide tailored care that addresses each patient’s specific needs. 

From intensive, evidence-based treatment for substance use and mental health disorders to specialized programs, our approach integrates psychosomatic medicine, psychotherapy, and holistic wellness services. 

Explore our dedicated luxury treatment programs to find the right path for your recovery journey.

CORE Program

CORE Program

The CORE Program at Futures Recovery Healthcare is a dual-diagnosis program for adults addressing both substance use and co-occurring mental health conditions. This luxury rehab program integrates extensive clinical hours, evidence-based interventions, and a continuum of care that includes detox, residential, and outpatient services. It focuses on addiction and mental health disorders that often coexist, such as depression, anxiety, and mood disorders and treats them by providing holistic, personalized care plans tailored to individual needs.

Key Highlights:

  • Dual-diagnosis treatment for substance use and mental health conditions.
  • Comprehensive assessments for trauma and holistic interventions for chronic pain.
  • Continuum of care from detox to outpatient services.
Learn More
RESET Program

RESET Program

The RESET Program provides comprehensive care for primary mental health conditions like anxiety, depression, and bipolar disorder. This program combines advanced assessment techniques, with personalized, evidence-based therapies. It offers residential and partial hospitalization options, focusing on empowering individuals to achieve stability and long-term mental wellness through intensive clinical services and supportive family involvement.

Key Highlights:

  • Dedicated care for primary mental health conditions.
  • Combines cutting-edge assessments with personalized treatment.
  • Offers both residential and partial hospitalization options.
  • Focus on rehabilitation, education, and empowerment.
Learn More
ORENDA Program

ORENDA Program

The ORENDA Program at Futures Recovery Healthcare offers premier-luxury rehab treatment, concierge-level care for professionals and high-net-worth individuals who require discreet, flexible treatment. This program delivers an adaptive and responsive continuum of care, meeting individuals precisely at their stage of recovery through comprehensive assessments and tailored integrated care plans. Emphasizing neurorestorative care, intensive individual and family therapy, and a broad range of wellness services, ORENDA provides a highly personalized treatment experience, designed to accommodate the demands of busy, high-profile lifestyles.

Learn More

Four Pillars of Care at ORENDA

Medical
  • Onsite Addiction Medicine and Psychiatry
  • Onsite Medical Director
  • 24-Hour Nursing Care
  • Medication Management
  • Pharmacogenomics
  • IV Infusion Therapy
  • Preventative Primary Care
  • Nutritional Consult
  • Psychopharmacology
  • Comprehensive Total Body Labs
  • Full Medical History Exam
  • Personalized Psychiatric Evaluation
  • Physical Therapy Evaluation
Neurorestorative Care
  • Neurofeedback
  • QEEG Brain Mapping
  • Neuropsychological Testing
  • Aiberry Screenings
Clinical
  • Trauma Screening
  • Eye Movement Desensitization and Reprocessing (EMDR)
  • Accelerated Resolution Therapy (ART)
  • Individual Psychotherapy
  • Group Psychotherapy and Psychoeducation
  • Family Therapy
  • Couples Therapy
  • Immersion Therapy
  • Spiritual Counseling
  • Specialty Clinical Assessments (Process Addiction, Eating Disorders, Gambling, Sex Addiction, OCD)
  • Personality Disorder Testing
  • Art Therapy
  • Music Therapy
  • Sports/ Motivational Psychology
  • ProScan Personality Dynamics Profile
  • Evidence-Based Therapies
  • Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT)
  • Dialectical Behavioral Therapy (DBT)
  • Gottman Relational Therapy
  • Experiential Therapies
  • Motivational Interviewing
  • Bowen Family Systems Therapy
  • Somatic Experience Therapy
  • Narrative Therapy
  • Gestalt Therapy

Wellness

HERO’S Program

HERO’S Program

The HERO’S Program caters specifically to first responders, veterans, healthcare professionals, pilots, flight attendants, and other frontline workers, addressing their unique challenges related to trauma, chronic pain, and addiction. This luxury rehab program fosters a community of peers who understand their experiences, providing comprehensive care through medical treatment, psychiatric support, and individualized wellness services. HERO’S Ascent aims to support participants in managing their health and recovery within a community that truly understands their journey.

Key Highlights:

  • Tailored for first responders, veterans, and healthcare professionals.
  • Focuses on trauma, chronic pain, and addiction.
  • Provides a supportive community of peers with similar experiences.
  • Includes comprehensive medical, psychiatric, and wellness services.
Learn More
MetaVida Program

MetaVida Program

MetaVida is Futures’ newest clinical service line — an innovative mental health program integrating neuroscience, psychiatry, psychotherapy, and holistic wellness to support individuals who have not achieved optimal results with traditional treatment alone.

This event offers an inside look at how MetaVida is redefining advanced mental healthcare within a safe, serene, and highly supported clinical environment.

MetaVida services are designed for individuals experiencing chronic depression, anxiety, addiction, trauma-related symptoms, and treatment-resistant conditions, with advanced modalities carefully integrated into a comprehensive treatment plan.

Key Highlights:

  • Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (TMS)
  • Ketamine Therapy with structured clinical support
  • Brain health assessments & cognitive training
  • Wellness-based modalities that regulate the nervous system and support whole-person healing
  • Collaborative medical and clinical care before, during, and after treatment
Learn More

Family & Alumni Support

Our commitment extends to family and alumni, providing education, support, and ongoing community engagement to strengthen the recovery journey.

Family Programming
Alumni Programming

Futures Programs Amenities

Accommodations & Comfort

*The MetaVida Program is designed to integrate with any Futures program, allowing you and your care team to personalize your treatment with innovative outpatient services.

Wellness & Creative Living

*The MetaVida Program is designed to integrate with any Futures program, allowing you and your care team to personalize your treatment with innovative outpatient services.

Recreation & Leisure (On-Site)

*The MetaVida Program is designed to integrate with any Futures program, allowing you and your care team to personalize your treatment with innovative outpatient services.

Outdoor & Off-site Adventures

*Adventure-based therapies are optional services and are not included in the cost of treatment. Participation requires separate payment and may vary based on availability.

*The MetaVida Program is designed to integrate with any Futures program, allowing you and your care team to personalize your treatment with innovative outpatient services.

Levels of Care

At Futures Recovery Healthcare luxury rehab in Florida, we offer a range of care levels to address the diverse needs of individuals struggling with addiction and mental health conditions, ensuring comprehensive support throughout every stage of recovery.

Detox

Our luxury detox program in Florida offers medically supervised and medication-assisted detox, supported by 24-hour nursing care and clinical services to ensure a smooth and safe transition into recovery.

Learn More

Residential

The residential level of care provides round-the-clock supervision, intensive clinical services, and personalized treatment plans. Residential care addresses depression, anxiety, personality and mood disorders, and thought disorders in a secure, nurturing environment that minimizes external stressors and supports focused recovery.

Learn More

Partial Hospitalization (PHP)

Partial Hospitalization Program (PHP) offers a well-structured and effective approach to addressing addiction and mental health challenges. It provides essential daily support, empowering individuals to continue their recovery journey with stability and confidence.

Learn More

Outpatient (IOP)

Our Intensive Outpatient Program delivers flexible, effective care, allowing individuals to balance recovery with daily responsibilities. It’s an ideal step down from residential treatment or a strong option for those needing significant support without the intensity of full-time care.

Learn More

Individualized Treatment Plans

Each patient’s journey begins with a comprehensive assessment, including advanced diagnostic tools such as artificial intelligence screenings and biopsychosocial evaluations. These detailed assessments guide the creation of personalized care plans tailored to each individual’s unique needs.

Specialized Therapies

Our luxury treatment programs incorporates a variety of specialized therapies to address trauma and pain, including EMDR, ART, Cognitive-Behavioral Therapy, Dialectical Behavior Therapy, and Mindfulness-Based Approaches. We also offer sleep assistance services using CBT for insomnia, acupressure, guided meditation, grounding techniques, and somatic experiencing interventions to enhance relaxation and overall wellness.

Our Facility

Recognized as a leading luxury rehab facility in Florida, Futures Recovery Healthcare caters to adults 18 and older. Located in Tequesta, our family-owned and operated facility has been a beacon of care since 2012. Set on a lush, 9-acre campus with all services conveniently located under one roof, we offer a nurturing environment that fosters safety and community.

  • Private, Gated Facility
  • All services under one roof
  • Private Accommodations
  • Fitness Center
  • Art Studio
  • Private Chef
  • Culinary Team
  • Accommodations for Dietary Restrictions
  • Wellness Center & Spa
  • Pool & Hot Tub
  • Tennis & Pickleball Courts
  • Basketball & Volleyball Courts
  • Low Ropes Course

Our Luxury Rehab Programs in Florida have helped many individuals reclaim their lives, as evidenced by testimonials from patients who have experienced significant transformations through our comprehensive care.

Our Programs

At Futures Recovery Healthcare, we offer a wide range of luxury rehab treatment programs in Florida to treat co-occurring disorders and primary mental illnesses Our holistic, evidence-based approach combines psychosomatic medicine, psychotherapy, and wellness services within a serene, 9-acre campus in Tequesta, Florida.

 
 Program Overview 

 

 
 Get Help Now 

 

 

 

 

Our diverse range of luxury rehab programs is designed to provide tailored care that addresses each patient’s specific needs. 

From intensive, evidence-based treatment for substance use and mental health disorders to specialized programs, our approach integrates psychosomatic medicine, psychotherapy, and holistic wellness services. 

 

 

 

Explore our dedicated luxury treatment programs to find the right path for your recovery journey.

 

 

 CORE Program 
 

 
 

 

CORE Program

The CORE Program at Futures Recovery Healthcare is a dual-diagnosis program for adults addressing both substance use and co-occurring mental health conditions. This luxury rehab program integrates extensive clinical hours, evidence-based interventions, and a continuum of care that includes detox, residential, and outpatient services. It focuses on addiction and mental health disorders that often coexist, such as depression, anxiety, and mood disorders and treats them by providing holistic, personalized care plans tailored to individual needs.

 Key Highlights: 

 

Dual-diagnosis treatment for substance use and mental health conditions.

Comprehensive assessments for trauma and holistic interventions for chronic pain.

Continuum of care from detox to outpatient services.

 

 

 
 Learn More 

 

 
 

 

 

 RESET Program 
 

 
 

 

RESET Program

The RESET Program provides comprehensive care for primary mental health conditions like anxiety, depression, and bipolar disorder. This program combines advanced assessment techniques, with personalized, evidence-based therapies. It offers residential and partial hospitalization options, focusing on empowering individuals to achieve stability and long-term mental wellness through intensive clinical services and supportive family involvement.

 Key Highlights: 

 

Dedicated care for primary mental health conditions.

Combines cutting-edge assessments with personalized treatment.

Offers both residential and partial hospitalization options.

Focus on rehabilitation, education, and empowerment.

 

 

 
 Learn More 

 

 
 

 

 

 ORENDA Program

This program delivers an adaptive and responsive continuum of care, meeting individuals precisely at their stage of recovery through comprehensive assessments and tailored integrated care plans. Emphasizing neurorestorative care, intensive individual and family therapy, and a broad range of wellness services, ORENDA provides a highly personalized treatment experience, designed to accommodate the demands of busy, high-profile lifestyles.

rawMentions: Co-Occurring

At Futures Recovery Healthcare luxury rehab, we address a wide range of behavioral health needs, including substance use disorder (SUD), co-occurring disorders, trauma, and primary mental health conditions.

Futures embraces the complexity of addiction, co-occurring mental health, and primary mental health conditions to empower recovery and improve outcomes through evidence-based practice, coordinated care, and mission-driven culture.

We prioritize a holistic approach that integrates trauma-informed care across all programs, ensuring each patient receives personalized care that addresses both mental health and co-occurring conditions, promoting long-term wellness and recovery.

At Futures Recovery Healthcare, we offer a wide range of luxury rehab treatment programs in Florida to treat co-occurring disorders and primary mental illnesses Our holistic, evidence-based approach combines psychosomatic medicine, psychotherapy, and wellness services within a serene, 9-acre campus in Tequesta, Florida.
The CORE Program at Futures Recovery Healthcare is a dual-diagnosis program for adults addressing both substance use and co-occurring mental health conditions.
